title: The Dark Isn't Scary
premise_summary: Boomy insists he's not scared of the dark. His shaking voice says otherwise.
cover_description: A cartoon bear standing bravely in the dark with three nightlights glowing behind him.
script:
[TITLE: The Dark Isn't Scary]
[CHARACTERS: Boomy, Pip, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: Ohhh, I just heard Boomy telling Pip about the dark. You should listen to this. It’s... special.

[/HOST_INTRO]

[THE_CONVERSATION]
BOOMY: I’m not scared of the dark.
PIP: Really?
BOOMY: Yep. Not even a little.
PIP: What about when the lights go out?
BOOMY: Still not scared.
[SFX: tiny_squeak]
PIP: What if it’s *really* dark? Like, no nightlight dark?
BOOMY: I’d be fine.
PIP: What if you hear a noise?
BOOMY: [PAUSE: 400] ...a nice noise?
PIP: Like... a *creak*?
BOOMY: That’s just the house stretching.
PIP: A *growl*?
BOOMY: The fridge. It gets hungry too.
[SFX: gentle_rumble]
PIP: A *whisper*?
BOOMY: [PAUSE: 600] ...my imagination.
PIP: Your voice is shaking.
BOOMY: That was SUPPOSED to happen.
PIP: I said this would happen. I SAID.
[SFX: pillow_thud]

[/THE_CONVERSATION]

[THE_END]
MELODY: And that’s why Boomy sleeps with three nightlights. [BREAK] Goodnight, little brave one.

[/THE_END]
host_intro: Ohhh, I just heard Boomy telling Pip about the dark. You should listen to this. It’s... special.
host_outro: And that’s why Boomy sleeps with three nightlights. Goodnight, little brave one.
